description: Waalaxy is a LinkedIn and email automation tool that runs safe outreach campaigns with templates, a Chrome extension for importing leads, and CRM integrations.
overview: Waalaxy automates LinkedIn invitations, messages, and follow-ups alongside email, with safety limits, ready-made campaign templates, and a Chrome extension to import prospects.
what_is: Waalaxy is a LinkedIn automation tool that also reaches prospects by email. It runs invitations, messages, and profile visits automatically while keeping activity within safe limits, and ships with a library of campaign templates to start from.

It suits sales and marketing teams that want LinkedIn-led lead generation without technical setup. You import leads with the Chrome extension, launch a sequence, and can see responses within days, with email finding to enrich and follow up.

Waalaxy integrates with CRMs like HubSpot and Pipedrive and connects to thousands of apps through Zapier. It is a prospecting and outreach tool rather than a full marketing-automation or analytics platform, focused on simplifying LinkedIn outreach.
